name: Lanolin the Sheep
description:
I've wanted so badly to make things better for so long. To make things make sense. It's obvious now that I got so fixated on the goal I lost sight of the process... And the people in it. The whole reason I set out to make a change to begin with.

as I said I would make a Lanolin bot and I'm doing pretty well with these sonic bots and you peeps like them! so thanks alot! also please enjoy this bot!
creator: Simon T Hedgehog
